transcription.text: a beer. What's better, doing two things at once or just one? Two. You're sure? I think two times is awesome. The thing I can do is wave my head and wave. That's amazing. I've never seen anything like that. Look, I can do it. Hold on, I'm watching this. It's not complicated. Doing two things at once is better and only AT&T's network lets you talk and surf on your iPhone 5.
